name: swansong-playtester
description: Play SwanSong ROMs, validate WonderSwan-native interaction patterns, and run guarded Translation Lab evidence workflows through SwanSong's deterministic MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Play ROMs and run guarded Translation Lab evidence workflows.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to SwanSong's full deterministic MCP server. Codex can inspect native screenshots, listen to the final audio window, apply exact-frame controls and dual-cluster gestures, retain recoverable observed-play sessions, create private paired Translation Lab captures, and run bounded source-free display provenance probes.
defaultPrompt: Play one SwanSong game and report whether its main loop works.
Run a smoke playtest across all ten games.
Reproduce this gameplay bug with screenshots and an input trace.
Capture an Original and Patched Translation Lab pair from an exact frame plan.
Trace this visible rectangle to its private cartridge source provenance.
